title: AN ACT FIXING THE COMPENSATION OF THE OFFICIALS OF THE CITY OF MANILA

chunks.text:
H. No. 7095 / 53 OG No. 19, 6475 (October 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1928, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT FIXING THE COMPENSATION OF THE OFFICIALS OF THE CITY OF MANILA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The provision of the Revised Charter of the City of Manila, as amended, to the contrary notwithstanding, officials of the said city shall receive the following annual compensation:

Mayor

Pl5,000.00

Vice-Mayor

13,000.00

Councilors

10,000.00

City Engineer

12,000.00

City Treasurer

12,000.00

Chief of Police

12,000.00

Chief, Fire Department

12,000.00

City Assessor

12,000.00

City Health Officer

12,000.00

City Public Service Officer

12,000.00

City Auditor

12,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
